trends.summary: 公开来源显示该议题正在发酵：Withdrawn case marks a victory for the social media giant after earlier landmark loss at trial over addictive claims A Florida teen whose lawsuit claimed Meta ’s platforms were to blame ⁠for...

trends.titleZh: 社区话题：挪威考虑对特朗普在世界杯红牌传奇中的角色提出国际足联道德投诉
trends.topic: 社区讨论、家庭消费、本地化、长帖解释
trends.summary: 公开来源显示该议题正在发酵：Norwegian federation president: Fifa on a ‘slippery slope’ Trump called Infantino for review of Balogun’s red Donald Trump’s role in clearing Folarin Balogun from a mandatory one-game ban at...
trends.summaryZh: 中文翻译：挪威联邦总统：国际足联在一个“滑坡”上打电话给Infantino ，要求审查Balogun的红色唐纳德特朗普在清除Folarin Balogun的强制性一场比赛禁令方面的作用。
